seasonal: Bitcoin finished April higher than its opening in only about 53% of the last 15 years - the seasonal statistics are less attractive compared to other assets. In the last 8 years, Bitcoin tended to close lower on April 8 than it was on April 2 in approximately 75% of cases.

statistics.description: In 6 out of 8 recent years, Bitcoin closed lower on April 8 than on April 2 (~75%)
In 6 out of 8 recent years, Bitcoin closed lower on April 8 than on April 2 (~75%) - range endpoint

insights: Despite historical model discussions, Bitcoin does not have a long enough history for robust statistics. The seasonal statistics are less attractive compared to other assets in the report
The weekly chart still shows a structure of weakness but also blocks the braking zone. Key support between 70,000-78,000 dollars is the main support area in recent months

The decline from the January high has already begun, creating a downward turning point pattern. With order structure breakdown, Bitcoin has already broken below one support level and is testing lower areas
From a weekly perspective, the pattern suggests further decline is possible but the braking zone near 70,000 may hold
The first weekly cycle of the month aligns with the April 2-3 dates and the 6 March to 6 April range, making this a significant time window
Daily chart continues to reflect a weak structure - even if in the short term strong moves are registered, this is a bearish environment for now
Levels between 74,600 to 76,000 dollars is the recent resistance area from the weekly chart. A breakout above could target 80,400-84,400 dollars zone

On the downside, the Fibonacci 38.2% of the entire bull rally sits around 49,000 dollars, with intermediate support at 53,300 dollars. These are theoretical targets if the decline deepens significantly
April appears to be the most positive month seasonally based on decade pattern, but given the current weakness, this represents more of a corrective bounce opportunity than a trend reversal
The discord community is recommended for real-time tracking throughout the month

technical.indicators: Weekly chart shows weak structure with broken support levels. Daily chart confirms weakness with bearish pattern. The 200-day moving average is an important reference. RSI showing divergence potential on the daily chart. The daily chart pattern suggests the possibility of a lower high forming.

summary: April 2026 in Bitcoin features 5 turning point dates (3, 10, 16-17, 27) with relatively weak seasonal statistics (only 53% positive in the last 15 years). The weekly chart continues to show structural weakness after the January high breakdown. Key support lies at 70,000-78,000 dollars where the braking zone sits. If broken, intermediate support at 53,300 and the Fibonacci 38.2% at 49,000 become targets. Resistance at 74,600-76,000 must be reclaimed for any bullish reversal. The first week of April and mid-month (16-17) are the key timing windows.
previous_month_review: March 2026 had five turning point dates for Bitcoin. Date 1 (March 2): Did not work, failed to contain the upward price movement. Date 2 (March 6): Worked, after a one-day delay, served as the 'high' of the movement and from there a decline of approximately 10% began. However, it did not hold as a true reversal and continued to fluctuate above this level until the next turning point, showing the area was significant. Date 3 (March 16-17, double cycle): Worked. The second date marked the high of the movement and from there a decline of approximately 9% began. Date 4 (March 20): Worked partially, as it was a small dip and returned quickly from above. Date 5 (March 26-27, double cycle): The first date marked the high of the movement and the second marked the low of the new movement toward the first turning point of April.
risk_notes: Bitcoin is a high-volatility asset with rapid and sharp movements - manage position sizes accordingly
April is not going to be a simple theme for Bitcoin - many daily turning dates are clustered, requiring focused attention
Important to note: timing is not magic - it is a method-based system that rewards patience
Stay connected to the Discord community for real-time updates during the month
For educational and informational purposes only - not investment advice
